data.title: GREEN: Add Step 3a tag-write to brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 3
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
Criterion 3 (non-executable instruction file, per behavioral testing standard Rule 5): SKILL.md is a non-executable LLM instruction document; behavioral correctness of the LLM's execution of the instruction is non-deterministic. Task 1 provides the structural boundary test (test_phase3_tag_write_step_exists) that validates this task's deliverable.

## Implementation
Add a new '### Step 3a: Write brainstorm:complete Tag' section to plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md Phase 3, inserted between:
- '### Step 3: Validate Ticket Health' (which ends with validate-issues.sh call)
- '### Step 3b: Write Brainstorm Completion Sentinel'

Section content:
```
### Step 3a: Write brainstorm:complete Tag

Write a durable ticket-level tag to record that brainstorm has completed. This removes any `scrutiny:pending` tag while preserving all other existing tags (e.g., `design:approved`, `CLI_user`).

```bash
# Read current tags from the epic
current_tags_json=$(.claude/scripts/dso ticket show <epic-id>)
current_tags=$(python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
tags = data.get('tags', [])
print('\n'.join(tags))
" "$current_tags_json")

# Remove scrutiny:pending if present, then append brainstorm:complete
# (grep -vxF exits 1 when all lines filtered; || true handles empty-tag case)
filtered_tags=$(echo "$current_tags" | grep -vxF "scrutiny:pending" | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//') || true
if [ -n "$filtered_tags" ]; then
    new_tags="${filtered_tags},brainstorm:complete"
else
    new_tags="brainstorm:complete"
fi

# Write merged tags via ticket edit --tags=
.claude/scripts/dso ticket edit <epic-id> "--tags=${new_tags}"
```

Pattern mirrors plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh read-merge-write. Replace `<epic-id>` with the actual epic ID variable available at Phase 3 execution context.
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] '### Step 3a: Write brainstorm:complete Tag' heading present in SKILL.md Phase 3
  Verify: grep -q '^### Step 3a: Write brainstorm:complete Tag' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Step 3a positioned between Step 3 and Step 3b (structural test passes)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh
- [ ] Code block uses .claude/scripts/dso ticket shim (not direct plugin paths)
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-shim-refs.sh (or equivalent shim check)
- [ ] || true safeguard present on grep -vxF command (handles no-scrutiny:pending case)
  Verify: grep -q '|| true' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] test_phase3_tag_write_step_exists passes (GREEN after this task)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
